description: The Lenovo Legion Pro 5 Gen 10 16-inch gaming laptop delivers elite performance for gamers and creators, combining high-end power with professional-grade visuals. At its heart lies the formidable AMD Ryzen 9 9955HX processor, reaching speeds up to 5.40 GHz to handle the most demanding titles and intensive multitasking with ease. This powerhouse is paired with the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 Laptop GPU featuring 8GB of next-generation GDDR7 memory, providing exceptional frame rates and advanced ray tracing capabilities for immersive gameplay. The 16-inch WQXGA OLED display is a standout feature, boasting a 2560 by 1600 resolution and a 165Hz refresh rate for fluid motion. With 500 nits brightness, HDR 1000 True Black, and 100 percent DCI-P3 color gamut, it offers stunning contrast and color accuracy for editing or entertainment. The screen includes low blue light technology and a glare coating to reduce eye strain during long sessions. For connectivity, it features cutting-edge Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 5.4, ensuring ultra-fast wireless speeds and stable peripheral connections. description: INTRODUCING ROG INTELLIGENT COOLING The ROG Intelligent Cooling system is engineered to keep performance at its peak during the most demanding gaming and creative sessions. With upgraded Arc Flow Fans, expanded heatsinks, and precision-cut ventilation, it ensures efficient heat dissipation, reduced noise, and stable performance without thermal throttling. Fan Cleaner Technology Self-cleaning anti-dust tunnels channel particles away from critical components, preventing buildup that could impact performance. This design helps maintain consistent cooling efficiency and extends the system’s lifespan with minimal maintenance. Thermal Compound Premium thermal interface materials are applied to both CPU and GPU, maximizing heat transfer from the die to the cooling system. This ensures faster temperature regulation and better sustained performance under heavy workloads. Thermal Sensor Control An array of integrated sensors continuously monitors key thermal zones inside the laptop, dynamically adjusting fan speeds and cooling profiles to deliver the perfect balance between performance and acoustics.

description: Beyond Performance: The Intel Core i5-13420H processor goes beyond performance to let your PC do even more at once. Keep Your Cool: Keep your cool amidst the most fierce gaming galaxies, thanks to Nitro V 15's innovative dual fans and effective exhaust system. As you navigate interstellar conflicts, your laptop stays serene as deep space. Its gradient design mirrors the neon hues of a futuristic cityscape, immersing you deeper into your gaming universe.  Stay Connected: Your gaming sanctuary is wherever you are. On the couch? Settle in with fast and stable Wi-Fi 6. Gaming cafe? Get an edge online with Killer Ethernet E2600. No matter your location, Nitro V 15 ensures you're always in the driver's seat. description: The Lenovo IdeaPad Pro 5 16AKP10 is a powerful, versatile 16″ laptop designed for creators, professionals, and power users who demand performance, visual fidelity, and flexibility. Whether you're a designer, developer, content creator, or power user — the IdeaPad Pro 5 blends high-end performance, display quality, and versatile connectivity in a package built for the next generation of productivity and creativity.

description: The Legion 5, in striking Eclipse Black, empowers gamers to explore their latest passions whether gaming, creating or anything in between. Featuring the latest AI technology with AMD Ryzen AI Ryzen 7 260 and next-gen NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 graphics, it brings a quantum leap in AI performance, from high FPS in top games to accelerated creation and university apps. The Legion TrueStrike keyboard with Lenovo Spectrum offers lightning-fast inputs and stunning 24-zone RGB lighting. Designed with students in mind, this laptop handles gaming, streaming, and coursework effortlessly. Lenovo AI Engine+ dynamically optimizes system settings, while Legion Coldfront Hyper ensures it stays cool and quiet. Enjoy breathtaking visuals with Lenovo PureSight OLED displays, all in a laptop that's 13% thinner and lighter for effortless mobility between classes, dorms, and gaming sessions. Manage everything with ease through Legion Space. Enjoy high-fidelity gaming, precise color accuracy, and extended battery life with Lenovo PureSight OLED displays. Fast response times, flexible refresh rates, and AI-driven adjustments keep your visuals sharp and smooth. Anti-Burn-In Technology ensures long-lasting performance. Legion Coldfront: Hyper keeps your system cool with turbo fans, 3D heatpipes, and AI tuning. Switch modes with Fn+Q, while Acoustic AI Sound Sync adjusts performance for seamless gaming and college coursework. Boost FPS, stream smoothly, and explore any university project with Lenovo AI Engine+ powered by Lenovo AI Core (LA1). Using scenario detection in Balance mode, it dynamically optimizes settings for games and apps. Easily managed through Legion Space, enjoy AI-tuned performance for both gaming and university coursework. Legion Space is a dynamic software suite preloaded on Lenovo gaming devices, offering AI-powered cross-device experiences. Manage device settings, display game libraries, access exclusive deals, and connect Legion accessories, all in one place. The Gaming Zone provides eSports players, content creators, and student gamers with personalized tools like Game Coach, Game Clip Master, and Game Companion.
